# Basic Markdown 🚀

This paragraph has **strong text**, _emphasis_, and `inline code`.

## Core constructs

- An unordered item
- A [link](https://example.com "Example")
  1. A nested ordered item
  2. Another item

> A block quote with **formatting**.

```javascript
const greeting = "Hello 🚀";
console.log(`${greeting}, Markdown!`);
```
